channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.118】Visual Studio 代码 1.118
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.118 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.118 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Python Environments Extension for VS Code- April Update】VS Code 的 Python 环境扩展 - 4 月更新
item.description: 【Python Environments — April 2026 Release We're excited to announce the latest update to the Python Environments extension for Visual Studio Code. This release focuses on startup performance, reliability,】Python 环境 — 2026 年 4 月发布 我们很高兴地宣布 Visual Studio Code 的 Python 环境扩展的最新更新。此版本重点关注启动性能、可靠性、

item.title: 【Azure Data Studio is retired: Move your Azure SQL workflow to VS Code in 10 minutes】Azure Data Studio 已停用：10 分钟内将 Azure SQL 工作流移至 VS Code
item.description: 【Azure Data Studio (ADS) retired on February 6, 2025, and support ended on February 28, 2026. The recommended path forward is Visual Studio Code with the MSSQL extension. If you used ADS daily, this guide gets you productive quickly in VS Code. The focus is on importing your existing setup, restoring familiar shortcuts like F5, and getting SQL】Azure Data Studio (ADS) 于 2025 年 2 月 6 日停用，支持于 2026 年 2 月 28 日结束。建议的前进路径是带有 MSSQL 扩展的 Visual Studio Code。如果您每天使用 ADS，本指南可帮助您在 VS Code 中快速提高工作效率。重点是导入现有设置、恢复熟悉的快捷键（如 F5）以及获取 SQL

item.title: 【Announcing Shader Model 6.10 Preview and AgilitySDK 720 Preview】宣布推出 Shader Model 6.10 预览版和 AgilitySDK 720 预览版
item.description: 【Overview Today, we are pleased to announce that Shader Model 6.10 and other features have been officially released with Agility SDK 1.720-preview and complementary DXC 1.10.2605.2. AgilitySDK 1.720-preview exposes the following features. There's more de】概述 今天，我们很高兴地宣布 Shader Model 6.10 和其他功能已随 Agility SDK 1.720 预览版和补充版 DXC 1.10.2605.2 正式发布。 AgilitySDK 1.720 预览版公开了以下功能。还有更多德

item.title: 【D3D12 LinAlg Matrix Preview】D3D12 LinAlg 矩阵预览
item.description: 【Welcome to the D3D12 LinAlg Matrix Preview release! Today, we are excited to announce the preview release for the D3D12 Linear Algebra APIs! This feature set unlocks comprehensive hardware acceleration for Matrix-oriented operations across various use cases. Previously, we announced the】欢迎使用 D3D12 LinAlg 矩阵预览版！今天，我们很高兴地宣布推出 D3D12 线性代数 API 预览版！该功能集为跨各种用例的面向矩阵的操作解锁了全面的硬件加速。此前，我们曾宣布

item.title: 【Looking at consequences of passing too few register parameters to a C function on various architectures】查看在各种架构上向 C 函数传递过少寄存器参数的后果
item.description: 【In our exploration of calling conventions for various processors on Windows, we learned that in many cases, some of the parameters are passed in registers. Suppose that there is a function that takes two parameters, but you know that the function ignores the second parameter if the first parameter is positive. What happens if you ca】在探索 Windows 上各种处理器的调用约定时，我们了解到，在许多情况下，某些参数是在寄存器中传递的。假设有一个带有两个参数的函数，但您知道如果第一个参数为正，则该函数将忽略第二个参数。如果您不能

item.title: 【Azure MCP Server now available as an MCP Bundle (.mcpb)】Azure MCP 服务器现在作为 MCP 捆绑包 (.mcpb) 提供
item.description: 【We're excited to announce that the Azure MCP Server is now available as an MCP Bundle (.mcpb). This means you can install the Azure MCP Server into Claude Desktop and other MCP-compatible clients】我们很高兴地宣布，Azure MCP 服务器现已作为 MCP 捆绑包 (.mcpb) 提供。这意味着您可以将 Azure MCP 服务器安装到 Claude Desktop 和其他 MCP 兼容客户端中

item.title: 【Chat History Storage Patterns in Microsoft Agent Framework】Microsoft Agent Framework 中的聊天历史记录存储模式
item.description: 【When people talk about building AI agents, they usually focus on models, tools, and prompts. In practice, one of the most important architectural decisions is much simpler: where does the conversation history live? Imagine a user asks your agent a complex question, clicks “try again,” explores tw】当人们谈论构建人工智能代理时，他们通常关注模型、工具和提示。在实践中，最重要的架构决策之一要简单得多：对话历史记录位于哪里？想象一下，用户向您的代理询问一个复杂的问题，单击“重试”，然后探索两个问题

item.title: 【Defending against exceptions in a scope_exit RAII type】防御 scope_exit RAII 类型中的异常
item.description: 【One of the handy helpers in the Windows Implementation Library (WIL) is wil::scope_exit. We've used it to】Windows 实现库 (WIL) 中方便的助手之一是 wil::scope_exit。我们已经用它来

item.title: 【Axios npm Supply Chain Compromise – Guidance for Azure Pipelines Customers】Axios npm 供应链妥协 – Azure Pipelines 客户指南
item.description: 【On March 31, 2026, malicious versions of the widely used JavaScript HTTP client library Axios were briefly published to the npm registry as part of a supply chain attack. The affected versions — 1.14.1 and 0.30.4 — included a hidden malicious dependency】2026 年 3 月 31 日，作为供应链攻击的一部分，广泛使用的 JavaScript HTTP 客户端库 Axios 的恶意版本被短暂发布到 npm 注册表。受影响的版本 - 1.14.1 和 0.30.4 - 包含隐藏的恶意依赖项
